name: gxwf
description: Galaxy workflow operations — validate, clean, lint, convert (single-file and tree)

strict.description: Reject unknown keys at envelope/step level
Reject JSON-string tool_state and format2 field misuse
Require every tool step to validate; no skips allowed

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate Galaxy workflow files (structure + optional tool state)

options.description: Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Skip tool state validation
Tool cache directory
Validation backend: effect (default) or json-schema
Directory of pre-exported per-tool JSON Schemas (for offline json-schema mode)
Output structured JSON report
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Validate connection-type compatibility (collection algebra, map-over)

commands.name: validate-tests
commands.description: Validate a workflow-test file (*-tests.yml, *.gxwf-tests.yml) against the Galaxy Tests schema

options.description: Output structured JSON report
Cross-check job inputs + output assertions against a workflow (.ga / .gxwf.yml)

commands.name: clean
commands.description: Strip stale keys and decode legacy tool_state encoding

options.description: Write cleaned workflow to file (default: stdout)
Show diff of changes instead of writing output
Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Output structured JSON report
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Skip stripping uuid fields (errors are always stripped)

commands.name: lint
commands.description: Lint Galaxy workflow — structural checks, best practices, tool state validation

options.description: Skip annotation/creator/license/label checks
Skip tool state validation against cached tool definitions
Tool cache directory (for state validation)
Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Output structured JSON result
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert between native (.ga) and format2 (.gxwf.yml) formats

options.description: Target format: native or format2 (infers opposite by default)
Write result to file (default: stdout)
Omit position info in format2 output
Force JSON output
Force YAML output
Force source format (auto-detected by default)
Use cached tool definitions for schema-aware state re-encoding
Tool cache directory (for --stateful)

commands.name: roundtrip
commands.description: Roundtrip-validate a native workflow: native → format2 → native, diff tool_state

options.description: Tool cache directory
Force source format (must resolve to native)
Output structured JSON report
Suppress benign diffs and clean steps from output
Show only steps with benign diffs (no errors, no failures)
Omit per-diff list; show only the one-line summary

commands.name: mermaid
commands.description: Render a Galaxy workflow as a Mermaid flowchart diagram

args.description: Output path (.mmd for raw, .md for fenced code block); stdout if omitted

options.description: Render frame comments as Mermaid subgraphs

commands.name: validate-tree
commands.description: Batch validate all workflows under a directory

options.description: Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Skip tool state validation
Tool cache directory
Validation backend: effect (default) or json-schema
Directory of pre-exported per-tool JSON Schemas (for offline json-schema mode)
Output structured JSON report
Write Markdown report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)

commands.name: lint-tree
commands.description: Batch lint all workflows under a directory

options.description: Skip annotation/creator/license/label checks
Skip tool state validation against cached tool definitions
Tool cache directory (for state validation)
Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Output structured JSON report
Write Markdown report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)

commands.name: clean-tree
commands.description: Batch clean all workflows under a directory

options.description: Write cleaned workflows to directory (mirrors source tree)
Force format: native or format2 (auto-detected by default)
Output structured JSON report
Write Markdown report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Skip stripping uuid fields (errors are always stripped)

commands.name: convert-tree
commands.description: Batch convert all workflows under a directory

options.description: Target format: native or format2 (infers opposite by default)
Write converted workflows to directory (required)
Omit position info in format2 output
Output structured JSON report
Force JSON output for converted files
Force YAML output
Force source format (auto-detected by default)
Use cached tool definitions for schema-aware state re-encoding
Tool cache directory (for --stateful)

commands.name: roundtrip-tree
commands.description: Batch roundtrip-validate native workflows under a directory

args.description: Directory to scan for native workflows

options.description: Tool cache directory
Force source format (must resolve to native)
Output structured JSON report
List only files with errors or failures
List only files with benign diffs (no errors, no failures)
Omit per-file lines; print only the aggregate summary
Write Markdown report to file (or stdout if omitted)
Write HTML report to file (or stdout if omitted)

commands.name: validate-tests-tree
commands.description: Batch validate workflow-test files (*-tests.yml / *.gxwf-tests.yml) under a directory

args.description: Directory to scan for test files

options.description: Output structured JSON report
Pair each tests file with a sibling workflow by filename convention (foo.gxwf-tests.yml ↔ foo.gxwf.yml/foo.ga) and cross-check inputs/outputs

commands.name: tool-search
commands.description: Search the Galaxy Tool Shed for tools matching a query

options.description: Server-side page size
Hard cap on hits returned
Starting page (1-indexed)
Filter hits to a single repo owner (client-side)
Drop hits where the query is not a token in the tool name
Emit machine-readable JSON envelope
Resolve each hit's ParsedTool and attach it as `parsedTool` (one fetch per hit; off by default)
Tool cache directory (used by --enrich; shared with galaxy-tool-cache)

commands.name: tool-versions
commands.description: List TRS-published versions of a Tool Shed tool (newest last)

options.description: Emit machine-readable JSON envelope
Print only the latest version

commands.name: tool-revisions
commands.description: List changeset revisions that publish a Tool Shed tool (ordered oldest→newest). Use for reproducible (name, owner, changeset_revision) workflow pins. Caveat: version strings are not monotonic — the same version can appear in multiple changesets.

options.description: Restrict to revisions that publish this exact tool version
Print only the newest matching revision
Emit machine-readable JSON envelope

commands.name: repo-search
commands.description: Search the Galaxy Tool Shed for repositories. Ranking is popularity-boosted; supports server-side --owner / --category filters via reserved keywords.

options.description: Server-side page size
Hard cap on hits returned
Starting page (1-indexed)
Restrict to a single owner (server-side `owner:` keyword)
Restrict to a category (server-side `category:` keyword)
Emit machine-readable JSON envelope
